/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/f1u_mbs_router_test.dir/common/f1u_mbs_router_test.cpp.o -o f1u_mbs_router_test  ../../../lib/f1u/libocudu_f1u_mbs.a ../../../lib/gtpu/libocudu_gtpu.a ../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a ../../../lib/nru/libocudu_nru.a ../../../lib/psup/libocudu_psup.a ../../../lib/gateways/libocudu_gateway.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsctp.so ../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
